creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180867
patch

The attached patch adds new port - UEFITool. It's used for parsing, exctracting and modifying UEFI images and is useful for e.g. extracting device firmware from UEFI image for use with Coreboot.

The port builds fine with Poudriere on 10.3-RELEASE.
